data.description:
Time: action
1action
Casting Time:
Range: Touch
500
Range: miles
V,S, small of you from Components: V,S
Duration: hour
Choose one of the options below to determine what happens when you use the *speak with animals* cantrip.
You have to choose one type of damage: acid, cold, lightning, or thunder.
A protective barrier surrounds the target, which is chosen when you cast this spell. The barrier resists attacks and spells from creatures of a particular alignment (chosen when you cast the spell).

You touch one willing creature. Until the spell ends, that creature has resistance to all damage types and is protected from certain conditions (charmed, frightened, or possessed by a different kind of creature). The target can make a saving throw against any relevant effect at the end of each of its turns, with disadvantage if it has already used its action this turn.
